summary: Verified hero headline color fix. All 5 span children in [data-testid=hero-headline] have computed color rgb(38, 70, 53) matching OUR SERVICES button background exactly. Italic on 'Trade' and 'Precision.' preserved. Bug is FIXED.
critical_code_review_comments: Inline style approach is heavy-handed but effective; consider consolidating to a single style on h1 (already set) and removing per-span inline styles for cleaner markup — non-blocking.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Hero headline color uniformity bug is resolved. All spans render #264635 matching brand-green button.
